product_overview: POS Restaurante es una plataforma web responsiva para punto de venta y gestión interna de restaurantes, bares y cafeterías. Centraliza pedidos, cobros, caja, inventario, productos, reportes y auditoría en una solución moderna integrada con Supabase.
core_goals: Reducir el tiempo entre la toma de pedidos y el cobro final.
Controlar de forma estricta las sesiones de caja, movimientos y cierres.
Mantener el stock e ingredientes actualizados mediante recetas y validación automática.
Proveer reportes y analíticas para mejorar decisiones operativas y de menú.
Garantizar seguridad, trazabilidad y permisos por rol en todas las operaciones críticas.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Permite iniciar y cerrar sesión, gestionar la identidad del usuario y aplicar permisos según su rol.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/token with valid email and password -> Receive 200 with Session -> Use authenticated session to access protected endpoints such as GET /rest/v1/orders -> Receive 200 with accessible data based on role
POST /auth/v1/token with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> Show authentication error and deny access to protected endpoints
POST /auth/v1/logout with valid session -> Receive 200 void -> Session is invalidated and subsequent GET /rest/v1/products returns 401 without a token

features.name: Product Management
features.description: Permite consultar y crear productos del menú, incluyendo su organización para la operación del restaurante.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/products with valid auth token -> Receive 200 with Product[] -> Display product catalog for management and POS usage
POST /rest/v1/products with valid product payload and auth token -> Receive 200 with created Product -> Product becomes available in future GET /rest/v1/products responses
POST /rest/v1/products with missing required fields or insufficient permissions -> Receive 400 or 403 error -> Product is not created and the catalog remains unchanged

features.name: Table Management
features.description: Permite visualizar las mesas del restaurante y consultar su estado para operar el servicio en tiempo real.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/tables with valid auth token -> Receive 200 with Table[] -> Render table grid with statuses such as libre, ocupada, and sucia
GET /rest/v1/tables without auth token -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> Tables are not returned and the UI should block access to the POS table map

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Permite consultar y crear órdenes para mesas, soportando el flujo de venta del restaurante.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/orders with valid auth token -> Receive 200 with Order[] -> Show active and historical orders for POS and caja
POST /rest/v1/orders with valid table, waiter, and item data -> Receive 200 with created Order -> Order appears in subsequent GET /rest/v1/orders results and can be progressed to payment
POST /rest/v1/orders with invalid payload or no auth token -> Receive 400 or 401 error -> Order is not created and the selected table remains unchanged

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Manage user login, logout, and permissions.

features.name: Product Management
features.description: Manage restaurant menu products and categories.

features.name: Table Management
features.description: Manage restaurant tables and their status.
